title: The Breath Of Candles
content:
The breath of candles,
    hot and murky,
    on the still air.

    Giant factories wave wands
    in luxury;
    contaminate roving commuter bands
    brown, from dirt knitted through white bread hair.
meaning:
"The Breath Of Candles" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
